data.title: Cathie Wood Calls It 'Financial Services Revolution' After Ark Analyst Highlights DeFi's Dominance Over Traditional Banking System
data.description: Cathie Wood, the founder of asset management firm Ark Invest, hailed the sharp growth of decentralized finance vis-à-vis centralized finance on Tuesday, calling it a “financial services revolution.”

data.title: Chamath Palihapitiya Says Marijuana Should Never Have Been Legalized: Turning 'Our Kids Into Zombies'
data.description: Chamath Palihapitiya sparked debate by calling marijuana insidious and warning of its impact on teens. He advocates for labeling and dosage restrictions.

data.title: Kimbal Musk Warns Of Boeing's Decline Amid US-China Decoupling: Fewer Planes, Pricier Parts, And Lost Jobs As Airbus Gains Ground
data.description: Tesla Inc. board member Kimbal Musk warned on Wednesday that Boeing Co. faces significant challenges as U.S.-China trade tensions escalate, potentially benefiting European rival Airbus.

data.title: Despite Unrealized Losses, Semler Scientific Plans $500 Million Securities Offering To Boost Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: Healthcare technology company Semler Scientific Inc. (NASDAQ:SMLR) announced its latest securities offering Tuesday to add to its fast-expanding Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) stockpile.

data.title: Tesla Bull Ross Gerber Says Elon Musk 'Doesn't Care' About Company Anymore, Blames Focus On Other Ventures For EV Maker's Slump
data.description: Ross Gerber criticized Elon Musk on Tuesday, stating that Musk "just doesn't care" about the electric vehicle maker.
